utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. (6) additional_services: includes name, details, and cost – fully specified. (7) total_budget: includes total cost, currency, and breakdown – fully specified. Therefore, all 7 out of 7 items are covered completely.
